name: macOS Navigation Efficiency
description: Sidebar navigation on macOS: cycle through sections (Benchmarks → Evaluations → Conversations) and verify each loads. Validates NavigationSplitView routing.

steps.description: Verify sidebar and detail column are available.
Navigate to the Benchmarks Dashboard via sidebar.
Navigate to the Evaluations section via sidebar.
Navigate to the Conversations section via sidebar.
Verify chat column is still responsive after navigation.
